Headline: Subway trains rerouted to elevated tracks
ShortDescription: Red Line subway trains will be rerouted to the elevated tracks between Cermak-Chinatown and Fullerton in both directions.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line subway trains will be rerouted to the elevated tracks between Cermak-Chinatown and Fullerton in both directions to allow for subway maintenance.

Trains will not stop at subway stations (see map below).

For fastest travel times, walk to the nearest ‘L’ station served by rerouted trains or use the free bus shuttle service offered between Fullerton and Clark/Lake in both directions.

Allow extra travel time.

*Entry/exit at Merchandise Mart station is via the Kinzie auxiliary entrance stairways, and requires a farecard (no vending machines), during hours when the building is closed. To make step-free transfers to Red Line trains during this time, consider shuttle buses to connect with Clark/Lake or Fullerton.

Headline: South Shore Express Temporary Southbound Reroute near Commercial/87th
ShortDescription: SB #26 South Shore Express buses are rerouted via Commercial, 87th, Houston, 91st, then resume their normal route due to street blockage near Commercial/87th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Southbound #26 South Shore Express buses are temporarily rerouted via Commercial, 87th, Houston, 91st, then resume their normal route.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Commercial/87th.

Headline: #71 71st/South Shore Temporary Reroute at Commercial/87th
ShortDescription: #71 71st/South Shore buses are rrtd via Commercial, 87th, Houston, 91st &Commercial, then resume their normal route due to street blockage near Commercial/87th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#71 71st/South Shore buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Commercial, 87th, Houston, 91st and Commercial, then resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Commercial/87th.

Headline: #87 87th Temporary Westbound Reroute near Commercial/87th
ShortDescription: Westbound #87 87th buses are rerouted via 91st, Commercial, 89th, Houston, then resume their normal route on 87th due to street blockage near Commercial/87th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Westbound #87 87th buses are temporarily rerouted via 91st, Commercial, 89th, Houston, then resume their normal route on 87th.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Commercial/87th.
